tasks.subject: Task 1: Bus sender identity (token + except)
tasks.description:
Give noteReloadBus per-subscriber token + emitNoteReload {except}. Back-compat for token-less callers. Files: app/src/lib/core/noteReloadBus.ts, app/tests/unit/core/noteReloadBus.test.ts.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/core/noteReloadBus.ts", "app/tests/unit/core/noteReloadBus.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- noteReloadBus && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["2-arg subscribe + 1-arg emit unchanged", "except:token skips that listener, fires siblings", "except:undefined fires all", "flush bus unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: updateNoteFromEditor self-emit on every write
tasks.description:
updateNoteFromEditor(guid, doc, sourceToken?) self-emits emitNoteReload([guid], {except: sourceToken}) after putNote; rename affected emit stays separate. Update renameRewrite.test.ts. Files: app/src/lib/core/noteManager.ts, app/tests/unit/noteManager.renameRewrite.test.ts.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/core/noteManager.ts", "app/tests/unit/noteManager.renameRewrite.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- noteManager.renameRewrite && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3rd sourceToken arg default undefined", "self-emit [guid] with except on every real write", "no emit on no-op/conflict early returns", "rename affected emit stays separate, renameNote unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Thread a per-instance token through the four hosts
tasks.description:
Each host (mobile page, NoteWindow, bundle Cabinet/Stack) owns a stable token, passes it to subscribeNoteReload + updateNoteFromEditor. Bundle token per-session, survives spread; add xmlContent + reloadToken to EditorSession. Files: app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte, app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte, app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/NoteBundleCabinet.svelte, app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/NoteBundleStack.svelte.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/NoteBundleCabinet.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/NoteBundleStack.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["stable per-instance token in each host", "token passed to subscribeNoteReload", "token passed to updateNoteFromEditor", "bundle token per-session, survives spread"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Reload-handler guards (xml-equality + focus/dirty)
tasks.description:
Add xml-equality no-op + focus/dirty skip to all four reload handlers (NoteWindow + both bundles lack the xml guard). Bundle sessions track xmlContent. Files: app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte, app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte, app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/NoteBundleCabinet.svelte, app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/NoteBundleStack.svelte.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/NoteBundleCabinet.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/NoteBundleStack.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["xml-equality no-op in all 4 hosts", "skip reload when focused+dirty in all 4 hosts", "bundle sessions track xmlContent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Flush-on-blur (the no-loss guarantee)
tasks.description:
TomboyEditor gains onblur prop fired from PM blur; each host wires it to flushSave/flushSession so leaving an editor commits it (single-dirty invariant = no lost keystrokes). Files: app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte + 4 hosts.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte", "app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/NoteBundleCabinet.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/NoteBundleStack.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["onblur prop fired from PM blur", "4 hosts wire onblur to flush", "unchanged-blur is a no-op"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Atom-aware caret preservation on same-guid reload
tasks.description:
New restoreSelection.ts helper (clamp + TextSelection.between bias); TomboyEditor preserves caret on same-guid content swaps; remove NoteWindow redundant setContent. Files: app/src/lib/editor/restoreSelection.ts, app/tests/unit/editor/reloadCaretPreserve.test.ts, app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte, app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/restoreSelection.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/reloadCaretPreserve.test.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- reloadCaretPreserve && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["same-guid reload preserves clamped atom-safe selection", "different-guid swap unaffected", "restore failure falls back without throw", "NoteWindow drops redundant setContent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Audit token-less callers, de-dupe automation emits, integration test, guide card
tasks.description:
Audit ~10 token-less emitNoteReload callers (unchanged); drop redundant explicit emit in applyDataNoteCsv + applyChartNote; add fake-IDB same-note convergence integration test; add 설정 가이드 card. Files: app/src/lib/automation/applyDataNoteCsv.ts, app/src/lib/automation/applyChartNote.ts, app/tests/unit/core/sameNoteConvergence.test.ts, app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/automation/applyDataNoteCsv.ts", "app/src/lib/automation/applyChartNote.ts", "app/tests/unit/core/sameNoteConvergence.test.ts", "app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["token-less callers unchanged + compile", "automation files drop explicit emitNoteReload", "integration test: sibling reloads, saver excluded, IDB updated", "guide card added under editor sub-tab"]}
```
